programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: With its impressive mounds of tender, juicy apples and melt-in-your-mouth pastry crust, deep-dish apple pie should take your breath away. Creating a pie with such a high volume of filling does, however, pose challenges.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: There seems to be a cookie to fit any occasion or mood. In this episode we look at two from opposite ends of the style spectrum—the thick, homey oatmeal and the dainty, elegant spritz.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: In this episode, we aim to resurrect the traditional birthday cake. We've developed an honest-to-goodness layer cake with an old-fashioned jam filling and real butter frosting—the type of cake guaranteed to put a smile on anyone's face.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: German chocolate cake—filled with sticky pecans and coconut—is not without flaws. We set out to develop a German chocolate cake that avoids the common pitfalls and delivers on its promise.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: We set out to make a meatloaf with well-seasoned meat and just enough binder to give the loaf a tender, not tough, texture. In choosing a side dish to partner with our meatloaf, we turned to another old-fashioned dish—skillet-roasted potatoes.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Dinners prepared entirely in one skillet are perfect for weeknight cooking. Less cleanup is one obvious benefit. A skillet also gives the cook a bit more control over cooking multiple elements.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Beef, beer, and onions have a natural affinity—it's one reason burgers and onion rings are often on bar menus. In a carbonnade, the beef melds with the soft sweetness of sliced onions in a lightly thickened broth that is rich, deep, and satisfying.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: We wanted a streamlined version of roast chicken with plenty of stuffing to go around. First, we needed to solve the problem of cooking the stuffing to a safe temperature without drying out the delicate breast meat of the chicken.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Boneless pork chops are lean and quick-cooking, making them ideal for weeknight meals. Pork tenderloin, which is also lean, has a somewhat fussy reputation, but you don't need to be a professional chef to cook tenderloin properly.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: We make a fresh-tasting, quick tamale pie with a juicy, spicy mixture of meat and vegetables and a quick homemade-cornbread topping. We also show you how to cook up a really flavorful chicken stew topped with a biscuit crust.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Whether we admit it or not, there are some dishes that are a little too high in fat and calories to be enjoyed on a regular basis. Even a modest portion of macaroni and cheese or chicken Parmesan is prohibitive. But that doesn't need to be the case.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: We wanted to be able to serve English-style fish and chips—large pieces of moist and delicate cod in a crisp and tender coating with thick-cut fries—at home.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Commonly found at catered events, this once-highbrow dish has become a bit of a joke. But after preparing several cookbook versions, we realized that pairing a crisp-fried coating with a delicate butter sauce was a great idea that deserved a revival.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: While the hallmark of this filet mignon is its tender texture, some argue that the beefy flavor is too mild, lacking the oomph of fattier cuts like rib eye. So we aim to boost the filet mignon's flavor with a peppercorn crust and a rich pan sauce.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: We love a good stir-fry served with rice, but a noodle cake, a savory round of tender noodles sautéed in a skillet until the exterior is crisp, is also a great base for a saucy stir-fry.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: We prepare a Thai-inspired beef stir-fry and share a recipe for great potstickers.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: We create tasty versions of two Tex-Mex favorites: chicken fajitas and huevos rancheros.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Just when we think we've become familiar with every Italian dish under the sun, we're pleasantly surprised to come across one we've somehow overlooked—Spaghetti with Marinara Sauce.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Fifty years ago, steak Diane was prepared tableside and included a burst of pyrotechnics supplied by a match and some cognac. Sure, such theatrics might seem a bit dated and silly, but they are essential to the flavor of the dish. We explain why.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Most of us might not have time to prepare eggs during the week, but come the weekend, eggs are a terrific way to begin a leisurely day. In this episode, we take a look at a couple of our favorite egg dishes—scrambled eggs and omelets.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Delicate foods, such as shrimp, are trickier to cook over the grill's intense, dry heat. We wanted to find the best way to grill shrimp so that it ends up tender, moist, and flavorful.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: In this episode, we show you how the strangest-sounding methods can sometimes be the most rewarding and how a few easy tricks can give an old standby, like roast chicken, a new lift.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: In this episode, we set out to develop ultimate versions of two favorite chocolate desserts: chocolate mousse and chocolate cupcakes.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Our goals in this episode are twofold: create an old-fashioned chocolate layer cake with the same moist, tender crumb we so fondly remember from our childhoods and infuse it with true chocolate flavor.

programme.desc: Jon visits The Hooch, an X-rated bar where the foul-mouthed owner wastes her husband's money and constantly berates her female staff.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: At an Ann Arbor, MI, college alumni bar, Jon is forced to deal with a hotheaded owner whose fiery temper keeps his staff on edge and his million-dollar debt on ice.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: A former psychologist turned bar owner attempts to run a Detroit jazz club, but her interfering family and lazy staff have her seeking counseling from Jon.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: In a Bar Rescue first, Jon helps a failing strip club saddled with a disinterested staff, a skeevy vibe, and an off-putting name: Chix on Dix.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: The feud between the owners of Mac & Chester's SRO has led to a bifurcation of their business and attracted a dysfunctional, rowdy clientele.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: The owner of The Gallopin' Goose ruined his marriage and his bar's reputation when he had an illicit affair that resulted in a child.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon schools the clueless owner of Grinders, whose unauthorized and unsafe renovation has the city threatening to shut the place down.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon is tasked with getting the apathetic owner of Van Goghz to put down her vape pen and start engaging with customers.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Bellator MMA comes to Sioux Falls, South Dakota where heavyweight MMA icons collide as French knockout artist Cheick Kongo takes on Russian destroyer Sergei Kharitonov.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Bellator MMA is in San Jose as Former Bellator MMA Light Heavyweight World Champion Phil 'Mr. Wonderful' Davis welcomes Yoel 'Soldier of God' Romero to the Bellator cage as the Cuban sensation makes his highly anticipated promo-tional debut.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: A highly anticipated rematch between former World Champion Douglas 'The Phenom' Lima and human highlight reel Michael 'Venom' Page takes center stage in London, and fast-rising Irish star Leah 'The Curse' McCourt battles Jessica 'Black Widow' Borga.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Light Heavyweight World Champion Vadim Nemkov puts his belt on the line against Lithuanian sensation Julius Anglickas in the main event, while Heavyweight World Champion Ryan 'Darth' Bader takes on Corey 'Overtime' Anderson in the co-main event.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: The Last Emperor' comes home for Bellator MMA’s first event in Russia as MMA Heavy-weight G.O.A.T Fedor Emelianenko enters the cage for one of the final fights of his historic career to take on one of the division’s top contenders, #2 ranked Tim Johnson.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: The Bellator MMA Lightweight World Championship is on the line as Dub-lin’s own Peter 'The Showstopper' Queally collides with Patricky Pitbull. And Irish phenom James 'The Strabanimal' Gallagher battles it out with Patchy 'No Love' Mix.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: One of the greatest mixed martial artists of all-time returns when Cris Cyborg puts her Bellator MMA Women’s Featherweight World Championship on the line against Irish knockout artist Sinead 'KO' Kavanagh.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Bellator MMA Bantamweight World Champion Sergio Pettis battles Rizin Fighting Federation Bantamweight World Champion Kyoji Horiguchi, and former Bellator MMA world title challenger Emmanuel Sanchez squares off with Jeremy Kennedy.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Bellator MMA Heavyweight World Champion Ryan 'Darth' Bader takes on Interim Heavyweight World Champion Valentin Moldavsky in a title unification bout to determine the true king of the division.

programme.title: Best of Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Dr. Phil helps a teen and her mom heal after secrets and jail tear them apart.

programme.title: Best of Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Dr. Phil uncovers the truth behind a taped affair. Can this marriage survive?

programme.title: Best of Dr. Phil
programme.desc: A family fractured by child sexual abuse sits down with Dr. Phil to learn the power of forgiveness.

programme.title: Best of Dr. Phil
programme.desc: 10 mo baby Lisa disappeared from her crib one October night. Her parents break their silence exclusively.

programme.title: Best of Dr. Phil
programme.desc: NFL star Terrell Owens confronts accusations from mothers of his children about missed support.

programme.title: Best of Dr. Phil
programme.desc: 2-yo Bianca was allegedly taken in a carjacking, but was Dad involved? And, what happened to baby Trenton? Did the boy's mother take clues to the grave?

programme.title: Best of Dr. Phil
programme.desc: A man's claim of his father's disappearance leads to a shocking deception.

programme.title: Best of Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Find out if Dr Phil can get some extreme freeloaders to learn to stand on their own two feet!

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Angie says stepfather Ralph routinely sexually abused her as a teen. Angie says that her stepfather didn't stop with her, he turned his attention, affection & sexual abuse toward her daughter Hannah. They say grandma Leta knew, yet looked the other way.

programme.title: Dr. Phil Primetime
programme.desc: Dr. Jordan B. Peterson discusses his new book, that helps inspire and unite by sharing the greatest stories ever told.

programme.title: Dr. Phil Primetime
programme.desc: America is facing a silent AND growing epidemic: the Adderall crisis. The use of this stimulant has exploded from 35.5 million prescriptions in 2019 to 45 million in 2022. The DEA warns we're on the brink of our next drug crisis.

programme.title: Dr. Phil Primetime
programme.desc: In a nation where tensions are running high and tempers are flaring, the escalating levels of anger in America today demand our urgent attention.

programme.title: Dr. Phil Primetime
programme.desc: An emotional conversation about why women being sexually assaulted is the most unreported crime in America.

programme.title: Dr. Phil Primetime
programme.desc: Dr. Phil joins Steve Harvey to guide teens at the Steve Harvey Mentoring Camp, teaching them to become responsible, ambitious men. Through laughter and tears, they inspire young men raised in single female-headed homes to reach their full potential.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: With the Clampetts established in business in Jethro's vacated office space, a building inspector visits to find out about their business operations on the 5th floor.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Mr. Drysdale hires a troubleshooter for the bank. His main mission is to get the Clampetts to close their business operating out of the 5th floor.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Sam Drucker comes to Beverly Hills to visit, and Granny assumes he's interested in courting her.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jethro meets Mrs. Drysdale's guru and decides he wants to be one also. Granny thinks it's all nonsense, but when she tries to put a stop to it the followers find her common sense inspiring and make her the head guru.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The Drysdales now jog so the banker can get the account of Jason Detweiler, head of a running club. The Clampetts don't understand the concept, leading to misunderstandings, then Ellie and Jethro become enthusiastic.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Famous singer Pat Boone is in the neighborhood and smells Granny's cooking. He wanders into their backyard and the Clampetts befriend him, thinking he's a hill country man down on his luck.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The hillbillies move back to the hills to find Elly May a husband, much to the dismay of banker Drysdale.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The Clampetts arrive in the mountain town of Silver Dollar City, where Granny starts a feud with an old rival, Elverna Bradshaw.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Granny continues her efforts to get Elly May married, extolling the young girl's virtues to every bachelor she meets.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Bird watcher Jane Hathaway hikes into the woods and finds a man for Elly May.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The Clampetts rehearse for Elly May's wedding to backwoodsman Matthew Templeton, unaware that banker Drysdale wants it stopped.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Drysdale and Jane arrive in New York to persuade the hillbillies to abandon their half-built cabin in Central Park and return home.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Granny insists she doesn't need glasses, although she carries on a conversation with a pet seal, thinking it's Elly's new boyfriend.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Shorty Kellems, proprietor of the hotel in Silver Dollar, sells out and leaves the hills to join the Clampetts in California.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Granny uses her shotgun as she punishes Jethro for leading too wild a Hollywood life with Shorty Kellems.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Mrs. Drysdale's nephew, who possesses a wealth of confidence but no talent, takes over Drysdale's private office at his Beverly Hills Bank.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The Clampetts visit Hooterville and Jed arranges to go into the airline business with pilot Steve Elliott.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Banker Drysdale eagerly prepares to set up the deal for a new airline formed by Jed and farmer Howard Hewes, thinking him the famous millionaire Howard Hughes.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jed Clampett and Shad Heller conspire to line up Shorty Kellems as a husband for the strong-minded widow, Elverna Bradshaw.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The hillbillies unsuccessfully conspire to get Shorty Kellems married to Elverna Bradshaw.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Elusive Shorty Kellems gets off the marital hook by convincing his eager bride-to-be that he is an inveterate gambler.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jed and Shad Heller discover it's a full time job keeping Shorty Kellems corralled until his marriage to the indomitable Elverna.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Shorty Kellms again short circuits fiancee Elverna's wedding plans, this time by marrying Mr. Drysdale's prettiest secretary.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The Clampetts set up a miniature farm so Shorty's bride Gloria can sample farm life, and soon the exhausted girl is delighted to hear she's not really married.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The hillbillies leave Shorty Kellems temporarily in charge of the Clampett mansion and he turns it into a hotel for single secretaries.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The Clampett mansion is set up as a hotel for women, and banker Drysdale decides to extort a few dollars from his secretary guests.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The hillbillies again meet "Honest John," the con man who had sold them half of Manhattan and then returned their journey.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: Brandon and Kelly each confess their feelings to friends, but expect the other person to make a move. Donna tries to reconcile with David. Steve and Clare double date with Ryan and his girlfriend.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: Donna and David visit her grandmother in San Luis Obispo. Noting a striking resemblance between David and her late husband, Mrs. Martin tells the couple about her romance with Donna's grandfather.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: Joey returns to the beach apartment. Rob irritates his manager by seeking Val's advice about whether to sign on for a new movie. Jim and Cindy invite Brandon to spend spring vacation in Hong Kong.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: Brandon and Tracy visit Jim in Hong Kong; Cindy is in London helping Brenda cope with mononucleosis. Clare and Steve encourage Kelly to go out instead of moping around the apartment.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: Mariah comes to town to give a lecture at the university's new age festival. She develops an instant connection with Kelly, prompting Tracy to bristle. David tries to plan a special evening for Donna.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: Brandon has to take care of Kelly and Valerie, who are both laid up with the flu. The girls discuss the reasons for their feud.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: Kelly learns that she is pregnant. Val makes a pass at David, prompting Donna to order him to end their working relationship. Clare is saddened by Mother's Day, so Steve tries to take her mind off things by going for a drive.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: Brandon is heartbroken when Kelly is unable to remember their relationship. Valerie helps organize Donna when she has trouble keeping track of her clients. Donna decides to make Val her business partner.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: Kelly moves back into the beach apartment. A designer offers to purchase Donna's work. David manages a rock band and allows the lead singer to crash at the apartment.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: Brandon and Donna discover that Rush owns the building that houses the sweatshop. David's credit problems escalate. Kelly fails to identify the shooter from the police lineup.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: Brandon's overprotection alienates Kelly; Donna learns she's been stabbed in the back by Valerie, who juggles her rich man and her poor man on a dinner cruise attended by Steve and Carly.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: Erica is arrested for prostitution and released into Kelly and Brandon's custody. Jodi claims that Steve is the only man who could have possibly fathered her child. Mel helps David file for bankruptcy and pay back Donna.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: Brandon is arrested for obstructing justice. David moves into the office at the After Dark and accidentally starts a fire. Valerie visits Sands and learns that Noah paid off David's debt.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: Dr. Monahan's behavior unnerves Kelly as he checks out her injured shoulder. Valerie warns Noah that he may be in over his head trying to manage the After Dark.

programme.title: Beyond the Gates
programme.desc: Martin has a physical altercation with the stranger. Hayley tries to reconnect with Ashley. Chelsea reassures a wary Madison that her ex is in the past.

programme.title: Beyond the Gates
programme.desc: Joey sends Marcel on a dangerous assignment. Naomi follows a lead into June's past. Smitty takes matters into his own hands where his family is concerned.

programme.title: Beyond the Gates
programme.desc: Martin reveals the truth about what happened two years ago. Anita returns home and is stunned to hear what's gone down while she's been away. Vernon and Bill clash over who's really calling the shots.

programme.desc: Jacob arrives with grave news for Smitty. Vanessa imparts information that sends Nicole on a fact-finding mission. The Duprees open their home to a new house guest.

programme.desc: Anita has some choice words for her daughter. Samantha makes a plea to her father. Elon puts Jacob in his place and asserts control over the investigation in the process.

programme.title: Beyond the Gates
programme.desc: Nicole confronts Ted about yet another secret he's been harboring. Anita tries to ease Vernon's guilt. Chelsea is livid with her father.

programme.title: Beyond the Gates
programme.desc: Eva stands her ground with Kat. Hayley has a life-changing surprise to show Bill. Allison is in need of medical attention.

programme.title: Beyond the Gates
programme.desc: Leslie uses her injury to further her agenda. Jacob questions a family member about a police matter. Madison thinks Chelsea is getting played.

programme.title: Beyond the Gates
programme.desc: Vernon comes clean to Naomi. Nicole confronts Bill about how he's hurt Martin. Kat is unnerved by what she walks in on.

programme.title: Beyond the Gates
programme.desc: Pamela has an intriguing offer for Dani. Hayley wonders if her husband is in deep trouble. Tyrell and Samantha feel lied to by their entire family.

programme.title: Beyond the Gates
programme.desc: Kat admits to Chelsea that she is hiding something from Tomas, Leslie asks an irate Ted for a favor, and Naomi meets up with a woman named Regina who may have the answers she seeks.

programme.title: Beyond the Gates
programme.desc: Andre takes Ashley on a trip, June confronts someone from her past, and Vanessa struggles to keep the peace between Joey and Doug.

programme.title: Beyond the Gates
programme.desc: Martin needs Nicole's help in order to save his marriage, Vernon does his best to assuage Anita's fears, and a shocked Dani gives her daughter some tough advice.

programme.title: Beyond the Gates
programme.desc: Anita locks horns with Sharon and Tracy before their big day, the Dupree sisters scheme for the greater good, and Vernon and Tyrell have a heart to heart.

programme.title: Beyond the Gates
programme.desc: Derek is painfully honest with Ashley, and The Duprees get ready for The Articulettes' Reunion Concert, while Hayley tries to convince Bill to let go of his attachment to his former family.

programme.title: Beyond the Gates
programme.desc: Anita surprises her fans with a major revelation. Samantha tries to broker peace between Martin and Smitty. Nicole lays into Leslie for crashing the concert.

programme.title: Beyond the Gates
programme.desc: Ted confronts Doug about his latest misstep. Jan gives her daughter some much-needed advice. Meanwhile, Vanessa's extra cashflow draws some unwanted attention.

programme.title: Beyond the Gates
programme.desc: Hayley calls in a mysterious favor. Pamela puts Dani on the spot. Naomi clashes with Bill over his involvement with Joey.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew

programme.title: Black Ink Crew

programme.desc: With Anya in the hospital, O'S**t tries to fix his relationship. Sassy decides to introduce her new girlfriend to the crew. Meanwhile, Ceaser, Dutchess, & Ted go to Arizona to bring Sky home but find out Sky's facing 8 years in jail. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew
programme.desc: Ted's true feelings come to light upon Sky's 2-month sentence to Tent City, one of the most controversial jails in the world. Puma's business partner, Med, plays mediator trying to squash the beef and bring the old friends back together. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew

programme.desc: Sky is freed from Tent City andTed is waiting outside for her. When Kathie has DNA results in hand, O'Sh*t deals with his past. Puma creates a plan to protect his family but results in a full-out brawl on the streets of New York City. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando encuentran víctimas en Filadelfia en un estilo similar al de El replicador, el acosador que ha estado siguiendo cada movimiento de BAU, el equipo piensa que esta podría ser la oportunidad que necesitan para tratar de detenerlo.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Tras descubrir que la escena de un espeluznante asesinato había sido montada, el equipo se da cuenta de que Abby era el objetivo previsto cuando unas pruebas clave contaminan su laboratorio y casi la matan.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Ziva queda en estado de shock cuando una táctica rutinaria que utiliza para someter a un sospechoso podría ser la causa de su repentina muerte. Mientras Ducky y Abby trabajan para limpiar el nombre de Ziva.

programme.title: CBS en español
programme.desc: no info available

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Genética
programme.desc: Cuando Eddie y Jamie se involucran demasiado en un complicado caso de adopción entre los padres biológicos y los padres adoptivos, piden a Erin que los ayude a resolver el conflicto sin ir a la corte.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Aún persiste
programme.desc: Cuando Danny acepta un trabajo extra como guardaespaldas para un ex convicto recién liberado que asumió la culpa por otra persona, aprovecha la oportunidad para ir tras el verdadero criminal.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Quien se aleja
programme.desc: Cuando la inmunidad diplomática complica un caso de abuso infantil para Danny y Baez, Frank interviene, a pesar de no tener jurisdicción en el caso.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando encuentran víctimas en Filadelfia en un estilo similar al de El replicador, el acosador que ha estado siguiendo cada movimiento de BAU, el equipo piensa que esta podría ser la oportunidad que necesitan para tratar de detenerlo.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: La BAU investiga a las víctimas que documentaban sus vidas personales y sus deseos internos en publicaciones de blogs y redes sociales. Además, Kevin se pone celoso cuando descubre que García puede tener un nuevo interés en el amor.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: La UAC se dirige al viejo barrio de Morgan en la ciudad de Chicago en busca de un sujeto cuyo objetivo son los hombres de mediana edad. Y una pista lleva a Morgan a creer que van tras alguien relacionado con el hombre que abusó de él cuando era niño.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando 25 años después se abre una cápsula del tiempo en un pequeño pueblo de Colorado y contiene una revelación espantosa, la UAC investiga ese crimen y un posible vínculo con la muerte de un oficial de policía local.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Mientras que cada integrante del equipo lidia con la ausencia de un retirado Gibbs, el pasado de Ziva la acecha cuando es testigo del asesinato de un militar perpetrado por su antiguo compañero del Mossad.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Narcotics officers end up in a foot chase during a buy-bust operation. Officers respond to a dispute with a tow truck driver at a strip club. The odor of marijuana on a traffic stop leads to a citation for the cooperative driver.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Police investigate an attempted residential robbery that turned deadly. Officers visit a residence to find a suspect facing warrant charges. A high-speed chase comes to an end when the suspect crashes into a fence.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An officer subdues a young man in mental duress before paramedics arrive to treat him. Officers stop a suspicious vehicle and find drug paraphernalia inside the woman's car. Officers respond to a robbery in progress.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers give chase to a suspect on a bike. A vehicle is pulled over and a passenger is arrested for possession of drug paraphernalia. Police are given a classic "I'm holding it for a friend" excuse.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A white-knuckled police chase ends in a dramatic escape and an unsettling officer injury. An intoxicated prowler is reported after a woman spots him in a tree. Officers bring in the K-9 unit to sniff out a suspicious van.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers utilize the help of the K-9 unit to find a suspect hiding in a shed. A cooperative suspect is faced with a list of charges. A motorcycle chase comes to an end after the suspect ditches the stolen bike and attempts to flee on foot.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Prostitute sting operations prove successful for undercover officers in both Wichita, KS and Palm Beach, FL. Officers inform an unsuspecting John that the individual offering up services is likely not who he thinks they are.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An arrest is made in a buy-bust sting operation after a hobbled dealer attempts to flee on foot. An elderly man is questioned after a report that he kicked a juvenile male in the face. A man is shot in the head by his female roommate.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An open container and crack pipe are discovered inside a teen's vehicle. Officers find a man at a nearby residence lifting weights after trying to evade police. A fight involving two men and a shovel is broken up.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Police respond to a fight in progress call, officers tail a vehicle leaving a house known for drug activity, and a man calls the police after his wife pushes his Harley over.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Police find a burglary suspect up a tree in a California backyard, a parolee at large attempts to flee officers, and a man with a suspended license blows his second chance.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers respond to a fight in progress involving mace at a minimart, and a woman tells police that her boyfriend threatened to flush her late husband's ashes down the drain.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man riding a bike at night with no lights decides to take off rather than talk with police, and a dangerous domestic dispute unfolds on the streets of Texas.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An officer pulls over a man making hand gestures at him while driving, an ex-Marine explains his side of a fight, and a traffic stop reveals a truck full of dogs and drugs.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers respond to a call that a man shot up his parents' house, a fleeing suspect hopes a change of clothes will fool the police, and a shaky hit-and-run story unravels.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man's addiction forces his family to call the police for help, a driver abandons his car and tries to evade officers on foot, and a man tries to conceal his illegal stash.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An uncooperative driver leads police on a high-speed chase, and an alleged convenience store robber in custody won't settle down until he gets a kiss from his girlfriend.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A patrol car en route to a call spooks a driver who then takes off at high speed, leading the officers to pursue him instead, and police investigate shots fired on a home.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers deploy a police dog to persuade a reluctant suspect to come down off a roof, and an outdoor birthday celebration is crashed by an alleged drunk driver.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Police deploy spike strips to curb a stolen vehicle, a parolee at large speeds away with a two-month-old in the car, and officers try to determine the details of a stabbing.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A patrolman pursues a scooter speeding through a neighborhood, officers try to subdue a raving man, and a woman has issues with her neighbor's dogs.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A cyclist tries to bolt when questioned by police, a deputy uses a cotton swab to procure evidence from a suspect's mouth, and an unmowed lawn triggers a domestic disturbance.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: When officers approach, a suspect flees into a fast-food restaurant. A driver takes his granny's wheels for a dangerous spin with cops in pursuit. Sheriffs catch up to a man who fled the scene of a possible domestic battery.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers stop a fleeing vehicle, and a man with a warrant learns that a doughnut shop is not the best place to hide from the police.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man on the run with a warrant tries to elude police by busting into a residence and hiding under a blanket, and a fleeing cyclist turns apologetic after being caught.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man resisting arrest sics his dogs on the police, and a recovering addict about to take his first hit in years wanders into the path of police in pursuit of another suspect.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Police investigate suspicious activity in a known drug area, officers encounter a jaywalker with the munchies, and a woman caught with meth wants points for honesty.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Royce Harmon was murdered 3 months ago in a scene staged to look like a suicide. Now another murder has taken place. Whoever the killer is he has a thorough knowledge of forensics, he purposefully has left evidence, and has baffled Grissom and his team.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom and his team investigate the death of a first class passenger on a flight to Las Vegas.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom and Sara investigate a bug riddled body found in the desert. Warrick and Catherine look into the theft of some valuable art.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: A woman is abducted from a supermarket. In the store, Grissom finds a bathroom stall door that claims five women have been killed.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: A man about to go on trial for arson and the murder of his wife and child seeks assistance from Grissom to help prove his innocence.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: A bomb goes off in an office building, killing one and injuring many more. The chief suspect is a security guard who left minutes before the explosion and has knowledge in bomb making.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: When a single human bone is discovered in the desert, Grissom and Catherine must cover miles of territory to find the rest of the skeleton.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: At a swanky fundraiser, attended by the sheriff, a woman turns up dead in the pool.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: A woman is abducted from a mall parking garage. She's raped, beaten, shot and left for dead. Sara collects evidence from her and grows attached to her.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: A body is found in a pottery store in what's apparently a robbery that was interrupted.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: A couple leaving a restaurant on their anniversary are killed in the street and their car is stolen. The crime scene is compromised when it rains shortly after the CSIs arrive.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The entire team investigates the abduction of the infant child of a well-to-do family. Suspicion immediately falls on the child's parents.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Two teenage girls run over a deaf man with their car, but they didn't kill him - he was already dead.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom, Nick, and Warrick take the case of a jogger who was killed by a wild animal in the park. It gets complicated when they discover that the jogger had his liver removed after he was killed.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Los equipos de CSI se unen para salvar a uno de los suyos cuando se enteran de que un miembro del equipo ha sido secuestrado y enterrado vivo, y ahora deben encontrarlo antes de que se asfixie bajo metro y medio de tierra.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Nuestro equipo forense vuelve a estar unido, con Grissom y Catherine liderando tres fantásticos misterios forenses.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Una estrella de cine es encontrada muerta en su habitación de hotel después de una fiesta, mientras que un taxista muerto lleva al equipo a una serie de muertes que involucran a trabajadores inmigrantes.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Nuestro grupo de investigación de crímenes intenta determinar si hubo juego sucio en la caída de un ama de casa por las escaleras.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Un robo en medio de la noche, en una casa suburbana al borde del desierto de Las Vegas, revela un vertedero de cadáveres.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Una familia de 4, es brutalmente asesinada en su propia casa.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: CSI determina que el suicidio de una joven madre fue en realidad un juego sucio.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Una parada de tráfico de rutina se convierte en una salvaje persecución policial por las calles de un gueto latino de Las Vegas.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: La evidencia apunta a Sofía como la que disparó accidentalmente a otro oficial.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: En la noche de "Acción de Gracias," un hombre es encontrado muerto en un contenedor de basura detrás de un restaurante.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: El hijo de seis años de una madre viuda es secuestrado en un parque local.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: CSI investiga el asesinato de un hombre que estaba cubierto de pelo de la cabeza a los pies y recibió un disparo en el corazón con una bala de plata.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI entra en el mundo de los drogadictos y las metanfetaminas.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Los CSI entran al mundo de la glamorosa Las Vegas.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When a murder occurs during a horse race, Horatio and the CSI team discover that Ryan has a personal connection to the case.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Calleigh is in a coma after a smoke inhalation injury sustained while investigating a case involving a dead doctor, drug dealers, and black market organ transplants.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: The CSIs make a shocking discovery about their murder victim, while Horatio tries to save his son from Julia's erratic behavior.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When a flight attendant is murdered en route, Horatio Caine and the CSI team uncover all the dirty secrets of airplane travel.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A home invasion becomes much more when Horatio Caine and the CSI team find out they're being targeted by the Russian mob.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When an innocent boy's life is in danger, Ryan is eventually forced to betray Horatio Caine and the rest of the CSI team.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A murder case involving extreme plastic surgery leads Horatio Caine to Ron Saris, who is alive and seeking revenge on Julia.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When a reality star is murdered, Horatio Caine and the CSI team delve into the scandalous, sexy world of a TV dating show.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio Caine and the CSI team, work to figure out why a seemingly normal family was targeted in a brutal grenade attack.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: The CSIs investigate the case of a man boiled alive, Julia spirals out of control, and one of the team's darkest secrets comes to light.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio fights to save Yelina and when Delko goes against Calleigh's plea and helps his dangerous father, his life is put in jeopardy.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: As Delko's life hangs in the balance, Horatio flashes back 12 years to reveal how Miami's CSIs first met and became a team.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When the lab is attacked, Horatio must fulfill a gunman's unique request in order to save five hostages, including new CSI Jesse Cardoza.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Three volleyball players mysteriously drop dead on the court, while Calleigh's testimony against Delko threatens his future as a CSI.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Se llevan a la fenómeno del tenis Lana Walker de su habitación por la noche y la única evidencia que tienen para continuar es una fibra púrpura encontrada en el marco de la ventana.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Cuando golpean casi hasta la muerte a una ex-víctima de violación, Horacio debe entrar al mundo de las cárceles y las personas en libertad condicional para encontrar al culpable.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Cuando un robo/homicidio deja a dos hombres muertos y a un tercero aún con vida, Horacio está decidido a averiguar qué sucedió realmente.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Todd Burton está tratando de salir de la furia del huracán cuando mata a un hombre en medio de una tormenta que le impide ver y ahora lo acusan de homicidio vehicular involuntario.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Un gasista se ve envuelto en llamas invisibles y muere. Todo esto sucede durante una carrera clasificatoria del Gran Premio de las Américas.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio finalmente cierra el caso del asesinato de su hermano. Se reencuentra con Suzie, una ex-drogadicta que estuvo involucrada con su hermano.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Después de que ven a una mujer siendo atacada por un tiburón, el equipo de CSI descubre que fue asesinada antes de ser arrojada al agua.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Una joven es arrojada por la barandilla de un estacionamiento, la investigación sobre su muerte revela pruebas de que la asesinaron antes de la caída.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Después de que encuentran muerto a un anestesiólogo de cirugía plástica por un aparente suicidio, Horatio cree que podría ser un caso de asesinato.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Un corredor de diamantes es asesinado a tiros en un estacionamiento, un hombre con discapacidad mental presenció el asesinato y quiere ayudar a Horatio a resolver el crimen.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Cuando asesinan a un hombre, Juan Marco Varón, que puede haber torturado o no a refugiados cubanos, llaman al equipo de CSI para investigar.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio y su equipo se adentran en el mundo de las celebridades e investigan el asesinato de un paparazzi. Él descubre que la víctima fue testigo de otro asesinato.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Ted Henderson muere en su propia casa y su cuerpo está desaparecido, mientras que dejan a su esposa y su hijo con vida, pero golpeados y atados.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: En los Everglades, cerca de un incendio controlado, Alexx y Delko registran la escena del crimen. Se ven obligados a protegerse cuando un muro de fuego los alcanza.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Danny and Lindsay find popular chef Alec Green dead in the wine cellar of his trendy restaurant with a corkscrew dangling from his chest.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A knight in shining armor impaled with a lance in central park and a businessman stabbed by an ice pick in a nearby hotel share a connection.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A serial killer’s verdict overturned when Mac jails his arresting officer, but a victim surfaces sporting the killer’s signature.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Stella is forced to deal with painful memories when Det. Valens visits and says her DNA is connected to a Philadelphia cold case making her a suspect.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The CSIs are puzzled when evidence and witnesses point to John McEnroe as their murder suspect despite his air-tight alibi.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Mac, Stella, and Hawkes are forced to save the lab when a drug lord and his crew descend upon the CSI’s vault to retrieve their merchandise.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A murder on the Statue of Liberty rattles New York City as the CSI team tries to catch the killer before he strikes again.

programme.title: Luna de porcelana

programme.title: Motín a bordo

programme.title: Cocodrilo Dundee
programme.desc: Michael J. "Cocodrilo" Dundee es un australiano de espíritu libre que caza cocodrilos con las manos, les clava la mirada a búfalos de agua y bebe hasta desmadrarse.

programme.title: Bridget Jones: Al borde de la razón

programme.title: Las estafadoras
programme.desc: Una mujer y su hija son estafadoras profesionales que utilizan sus armas de seducción para engañar a millonarios, hasta que la joven hija se enamora poniendo en apuros el último golpe: un excéntrico magnate del tabaco.

programme.title: Footloose
programme.desc: El citadino Ren MacCormack se muda a un pequeño pueblo donde el rock and roll y el baile están prohibidos. Su espíritu rebelde sacude a la población.

programme.title: Perfectos desconocidos
programme.desc: Cuando un grupo de mejores amigos se reúne durante un eclipse lunar para compartir una cena íntima en la elegante casa de Eva y Antonio, sospechan que se trata de otra noche cualquiera hasta que la anfitriona les propone un juego.

programme.title: Volando Alto
programme.desc: Gwyneth Paltrow protagoniza en esta comedia hilarante sobre una chica de pueblo con grandes planes. Cuando se propone ser azafata internacional de primera clase, Donna se arriesga y sale a perseguir su sueño.

programme.title: Decepcionado
programme.desc: Una entretenida comedia sobre dos viejos amigos, y examantes, cuya reunión sorpresa cambia sus vidas y la de todos los demás en su pequeño pueblo, el cual se encuentra en crisis.

programme.title: ¿Solo amigos?
programme.desc: Harto de malas relaciones, Wallace (Daniel Radcliffe), que abandonó su carrera de medicina, decide poner su vida amorosa en pausa. Tras enamorarse de Chantry (Zoe Kazan), una animadora que vive con su novio Ben (Rafe Spall), el "amor" se complica.

programme.title: El informante
programme.desc: Moe Diamond, blanqueador de capitales, sufre un accidente automovilístico que lo deja sin memoria, con millones en efectivo, y un grupo de policías corruptos persiguiéndole. Liam Hemsworth protagoniza este oscuro thriller de acción.

programme.title: Cyborg
programme.desc: En una tierra azotada por la plaga del siglo XXI, un hermoso Cyborg mitad humano tiene la información que puede salvar la civilización. ¡Pero solo la fortaleza y astucia de un guerrero solitario será capaz de salvar esos hechos importantes!

programme.title: Doble impacto
programme.desc: Jean-Claude Van Damme hace el papel de los gemelos, Chad y Alex Wagner, hermanos separados tras el brutal asesinato de sus padres. Veinticinco años después, el destino los reúne para vengarse y causar un dolor doble.

programme.title: Sentencia de muerte
programme.desc: La superestrella de acción Jean-Claude van Damme (Contacto sangriento, Cyborg) es un veterano agente secreto que se hace pasar por un recluso en una peligrosa prisión estatal.

programme.title: Asesinatos accidentales
programme.desc: Mike Fallon es un sicario experimentado conocido por hacer que la muerte de sus objetivos parezca un accidente. Cuando su novia aparece muerta, él va tras sus antiguos colegas para encontrar al responsable.

programme.title: Insignias de furia

programme.title: Actos de violencia

programme.title: Asesinatos accidentales
programme.desc: Mike Fallon es un sicario experimentado conocido por hacer que la muerte de sus objetivos parezca un accidente. Cuando su novia aparece muerta, él va tras sus antiguos colegas para encontrar al responsable.

programme.desc: Después de que su prometido muere inesperadamente, una mujer decide aceptar la vida y seguir su sueño de trabajar con chocolate.

programme.title: Viernes 13: parte 2

programme.desc: Michael J. "Cocodrilo" Dundee es un australiano de espíritu libre que caza cocodrilos con las manos, les clava la mirada a búfalos de agua y bebe hasta desmadrarse.

programme.title: Cocodrilo Dundee en Los Ángeles

programme.title: Malaventura

programme.title: Pootie Tang: luce tu cuerpo y lo gozarás

programme.title: El señor mamá

programme.title: Perdidos en Nueva York

programme.title: Last Train From Gun Hill

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Un violador en serie anda suelto en una ciudad de Texas. Nadie sabía dónde atacaría a continuación, pero la audacia de sus ataques y la escalada de violencia contra sus víctimas hicieron que encontrarlo fuera imperativo.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Los jóvenes navajos del suroeste estaban muriendo a un ritmo alarmante. Los curanderos de la tribu proporcionaron a los investigadores una pista fundamental que llevaría al otro lado del mundo al asesino más improbable.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Rompecabezas de plástico
programme.desc: Un hombre que iba en bicicleta resultó herido de muerte y la policía creía que había sido víctima de un accidente de atropello y fuga.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Lisa Manderach y su hija Devon dejaron su casa para ir de compras, pero no regresaron a la hora que se esperaba. El esposo de Lisa, Jimmy, llamó a la policía lleno de pánico para denunciar su desaparición y los dirigió a un centro comercial cercano.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1996, Derrick Duehren regresó para encontrar su casa en Oregon hecha cenizas. Los restos calcinados de su esposa se encontraron luego en los escombros. Los investigadores intentaron determinar si fue un accidente desafortunado o un asesinato.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En una trágica jugada del destino, pocos días después de que la mujer vendiera su casa y se mudara a un modesto remolque, un incendio se llevó tanto el remolque como su vida. Pero la autopsia demostró que no fue un accidente.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Los sobrevivientes de las atrocidades nazis reconocieron al arzobispo Trifa, exjefe de la Iglesia Ortodoxa Rumana en los Estados Unidos, por haber dirigido un sangriento ataque contra los judíos durante la Segunda Guerra Mundial.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Rompecabezas de plástico
programme.desc: Un hombre que iba en bicicleta resultó herido de muerte y la policía creía que había sido víctima de un accidente de atropello y fuga.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando el secretario de la corte, Peter Porco, no se presenta a trabajar en noviembre de 2004, se ordena a un oficial de la corte que se dirija a la casa familiar de los Porcos en Bethlehem, Nueva York.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: La policía de Seattle no tenía sospechosos en el violento asesinato de la cantante post-grunge, Mia Zapata.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: La mujer estaba muerta. Al hombre le habían disparado cuatro veces pero sobrevivió.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando Rosemary Anderson es encontrada muerta a un lado de la carretera, su novio se convierte en el principal sospechoso.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En el 2000, cuando la adolescente Tara Munsey desapareció al salir de su trabajo en un restaurante de Virginia, no se sabe si se escapó o si fue víctima de un juego sucio.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 2006, Darlene Vander Giesen recibió correos electrónicos amenazantes y luego desapareció. Rastrear los correos electrónicos llevó a la policía a la casa de Daphne Wright, donde creen que se cometió un asesinato.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Mark Fair se fue a trabajar y su prometida, Karla Brown, se quedó en casa. Más tarde, la encontró muerta. Durante la autopsia, se volvieron a examinar las marcas de mordeduras en su cuerpo y la odontología forense identificó al asesino.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Durante 15 meses, un asesino en serie estranguló a prostitutas en Florida y luego se burló de la policía dejando los cuerpos a la vista. Las únicas pistas fueron una huella de neumático y algunos hilos.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Asesino cereal
programme.desc: Cuando un incendio destruyó la mayor parte de una casa y un niño desapareció, la policía organizó la búsqueda más grande en la historia de su pequeña ciudad.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Fiebre del oro
programme.desc: El despacho de emergencia recibió una llamada de un hombre que dijo que su novia se disparó y se suicidó. La autopsia reveló que la herida de bala no fue autoinfligida.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: La víctima había sido agredida sexualmente y apuñalada hasta la muerte en la playa. Se descubrió un par de zapatos de tenis de hombre cerca de su cuerpo.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Por lo general, es fácil determinar cómo un criminal entró en la escena del crimen. Pero en este caso, estaba lejos de esclarecerse. Parecía que el asesino se desvaneció y quizá lo hizo.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Se descubrió un esqueleto humano en las marismas de Carolina del Norte y, cuando los investigadores descubrieron que había estado muerta durante 18 meses, sabían que sería difícil descubrir quién era, y mucho más quién la mató.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Se encontró el cuerpo de una mujer joven y una pequeña fibra en la ropa de la víctima llevó a la policía de San Diego directamente al asesino más improbable.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando una joven fue encontrada muerta, la policía arrestó rápidamente al sospechoso más probable. Pero la tecnología de punta de la NASA permitió a un odontólogo forense demostrar que el hombre equivocado estaba tras las rejas.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando la casa de un policía se incendia, los expertos sospechan de un incendio provocado. El oficial cuya casa fue incendiada arresta al narcotraficante de bajo nivel James Wren, quien confiesa.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: El asesino probablemente esperaba cubrir sus huellas escenificando la escena del crimen. Pero los investigadores descubrieron el intento casi de inmediato y recurrieron a la ciencia forense para saber qué sucedió esa noche realmente.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1987, se descubrieron un cráneo humano y algunos huesos en un campamento de niños exploradores cerca de Farmington, Missouri. La reconstrucción facial ayuda a los investigadores en este caso.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos

programme.desc: Drew is terrified that Vince will come for him and he’s unable to function normally. He pushes away Bianca and when she tries to make it right, she only causes Drew more pain.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Dave and Adam want to co-host an in-school radio show. Dave has concerns because Adam is transgender. When Dave voices his discomfort over the airwaves, the school turns against him.

programme.title: Lost Cities of The Ancients
programme.desc: It was one of the greatest vanishing acts in history. More than 3,000 years ago a mysterious and ruthless civilisation rose from nothing, created a brutal and unstoppable army and built an empire that rivalled Egypt and Babylon.

programme.title: Wildlife on One
programme.desc: Fossil remains serve as clues in discovering how prehistoric flying creatures lived.

programme.title: Prehistoric Autopsy
programme.desc: Anatomist Professor Alice Roberts and biologist Dr George McGavin go on an extraordinary evolutionary journey to meet our ancient ancestors. They start with our closest prehistoric relative, a Neanderthal.

programme.title: Prehistoric Autopsy
programme.desc: The team go back 1.5 million years to meet one of the earliest humans, Homo erectus. They walked the earth far longer than any other human species and were the first ancestors to look a lot like we do today.

programme.title: Prehistoric Autopsy
programme.desc: The team looks at probably the most famous of all our early ancestors. She is called Lucy from the species Australopithecus afarensis and she lived 3.2 million years ago. Lucy's species had traded life in the trees for life on the ground.

programme.title: The Lost World
programme.desc: Professor Challenger leads a party of explorers from the smog of Edwardian London to South America in search of a mythical plateau rumoured to be inhabited by dinosaurs.

programme.title: The Lost World
programme.desc: Professor Challenger leads a party of explorers from the smog of Edwardian London to South America in search of a mythical plateau rumoured to be inhabited by dinosaurs.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: The life of the first reptilian carnivores on Earth, told through computer animation.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: The Jurassic period saw the advent of the largest and strongest dinosaurs that ever roamed the Earth.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: A look at the world as it was 149 million years ago - in the late Jurassic Period. The old continents have broken up and much of the land is under water. Huge shallow seas have supported a revolution in marine life.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: With wings longer than those of a small plane, pterosaurs were the largest creatures ever known to have flown.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: This programme looks at the Cretaceous period, 106 million years ago. Volcanic activity forces the continents apart, and dinosaurs diversify into a range of species to cope with environmental extremes.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: It is the late Cretaceous period and Tyrannosaurus rex is the top predator, but the Earth is poisoned by volcanic activity and a comet strikes.

programme.title: Horizon
programme.desc: Exploring the newfound remains of a dinosaur species considered the biggest carnivore in history, all while posing the question whether they engaged in a fight against the Argentinasaurus.

programme.title: Planet Dinosaur
programme.desc: It is only in recent years that experts have unearthed the biggest dinosaurs that ever lived. One monster eclipsed all others, more than seven times as heavy as diplodocus was the immense argentinosaurus.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: The only clue to the Master's plans is a single plastic daffodil.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: Hepesh is revealed to be behind the attacks.

programme.title: Doctor Who
programme.desc: The Doctor tests a machine designed to extract evil particles from the brains of convicted criminals.

programme.title: Doctor Who
programme.desc: Prisoners revolt at the institute where the mind machine is being tested.

programme.title: Doctor Who
programme.desc: The Doctor is captured by the Master and fitted with a telepathic amplifier.

programme.title: Doctor Who
programme.desc: The Doctor decides to destroy the parasite in the mind machine, but it has dematerialized.

programme.title: Doctor Who
programme.desc: The Master and Doctor join forces to destroy the machine.

programme.title: Doctor Who

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: The Doctor and Sarah discover that an ancient and powerful evil is manifesting on Earth.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: Inside the pyramid on Mars, the Doctor and Sarah must prevent Sutekh's release.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: The Doctor learns of the discovery of two alien seed pods in the Antarctic.

programme.desc: The Krynoid demands that the Doctor be surrendered to it.

programme.desc: The Doctor, Sarah and Scorby are hunted down by the mad Harrison Chase.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A border collie/greyhound mix with an aversion to other dogs; a woman tries to tame her dog's nervousness; a large dog with too much energy.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Cesar helps Casey Anderson, of "Expedition Wild," and his wife, actress Missi Pyle, with their dogs; a pit bull's fears make him aggressive.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Cesar joins forces with Jennifer McCarthy to examine the nature of wolf-dogs, the result of the cross-breeding of wolves and domestic dogs.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A miniature schnauzer compulsively spins in circles; four French bulldogs do not listen to their owner; a mixed breed has a leash tied so tightly it has to be surgically removed.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Cesar Milan is called in to help singer Patti LaBelle who is afraid of her own guard dog and a teacher who wants to unify her dog's dual personalities.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A ridgeback mix has eccentricities; a Jack Russell terrier attacks motorcycles; a border collie's herding instincts get the best of him.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: An Australian shepherd is too dedicated to its owner; a beagle mix lashes out at anyone who walks past; an Italian mastiff fears cars.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A puppy terrorizes its owner's cat; a spoiled Yorkshire terrier; a Rottweiler is aggressive toward strangers.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: An Italian greyhound mix is possessive over bones and toys; a mastiff misbehaves outside; a Yorkshire terrier takes over her owner's morning routine.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: An unpredictably aggressive Kerry blue terrier; two territorial Maltese dogs who are close to being banned from the retirement home where they live; a bloodhound/Catahoula mix who attacks her canine companion.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Cesar visits Tijuana, Mexico, to team up with volunteers from United Hope for Animals, an organization that rescues dogs and finds them U.S. homes; a cocker spaniel taunts her owner.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A golden retriever mix with canine aggression; a bearded collie who barks, howls and scratches at her owner's boyfriend's guitar; a Lhasa apso/Cavalier Kind Charles Spaniel with canine aggression.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Cesar tries to restore peace at an apartment complex where the residents' dogs do not get along; a family has trouble controlling its three dogs.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: An American Eskimo dog attacks doors and windows whenever people pass; a shiba inu overprotects his corgi playmate; two bulldogs are aggressive.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog is going to be the keynote speaker at the annual Profession Bail Agents convention in Las Vegas, but before he leaves he's got to clear two cases from his docket--Heidi and Stephanie.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Tim's got a big problem. Owen has failed to appear in court. He's on bond for serious drug charges and now Tim could lose $30,000 if he doesn't catch Owen. With Dog's help he tries to track down the co-signer but they come up dry.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: It's been raining for days and the team is going a little stir-crazy, but Dog has the cure; a good hunt. Maui has failed to appear on a drug charge and the team has just one lead. She was recently spotted during a bust at a local chop shop garage.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog decides it's time to outfit the Da Kine crew with new SUVs. After a quick visit to their local dealership, they go after Jasmine, a woman whose criminal record includes over 37 arrests for everything from drug promotion to assault.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog has two fugitives to catch, and he gets help from the unlikeliest sources--the fugitives' mothers. First, Ginger's mother wants to revoke her daughter's bond. Then Brandon's mother decides to revoke his bond because Brandon has an ice habit.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog is back hunting in the big city of Denver, but chasing fugitives on the mainland is more dangerous than ever. So Dog decides that the crew should get pepper-ball guns, which have much better range than pepper spray.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog decides to help two of his bondsmen buddies, Dave "Red" Widhelm and "Downtown" Bobby Brown. First up is Red, who has a client, named Alvin, whose bond is $20,000. Then the team goes after Craig, a client of Bobby's whose bond is almost $70,000.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog leads the team on another adrenaline-filled chase in Denver. The fugitive, Robert, has a habit of address-hopping that makes him a difficult target, but Dog refuses to give up and finally tracks Robert down in his latest hideaway.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: The team is still in Colorado, and today Dog starts his day by to giving his kids and crew a sample of their western heritage by taking them horseback riding. This hunt takes Dog back to his old stomping grounds in Denver.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog's time is running out in Colorado. After a month of helping his bail bondsmen friends around Denver, he's got to get his family back home to Hawaii. But Dog wants one more capture before they leave.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog kick-starts the search for Jackson, a 240lbs, six feet tall bad boy who has skipped out on a $10,000 bond. Jackson’s apparently at his father-in-law's house, but the father-in-law has info about Jackson that brings Dog to a unique hideout.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: With twelve kids of his own, Dog knows how hard it is to keep children on the straight and narrow, especially during their turbulent teens.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: A one-hour special that looks back at 2006, one of Dog's most tumultuous years, which has included the passing of Beth's father, Dog and Beth's wedding, the tragic death of Dog's daughter Barbara.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: When Lyssa points out that the fugitive in the next case has the same birth date as Barbara, Dog's recently deceased daughter, the team takes a special vow to capture the young woman.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog finds himself fighting two enemies; the law and his inner demons. He continues his legal battle to fight extradition to Mexico in connection with his 2003 capture of fugitive rapist Andrew Luster. His other struggle is private.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog shows his love of justice and children in this poignant episode. He begins by giving encouragement to a group of handicapped children, then starting the search for Jacob, a fugitive who's abandoned his wife and children.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Michael is out on bail for drug sales, theft, and violation of parole. Dog's after him for failing to appear in court and his only lead is Jen, his co-signer and girlfriend.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and the boys are going after a fugitive with a $25,000 bond and a string of theft charges behind him. When the team hits his apartment, they find a boot print on the door, a souvenir of a police raid from only days earlier?

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: A Hawaiian surfing hero is on a wave to nowhere, and it's Dog's turn to play lifeguard. "Buttons," known throughout the islands for his prowess on the waves and his daring 360's, has wiped-out on the rocky shoals of drug addiction.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Kristine had a string of gambling and forgery charges before she jumped bail, leaving Dog "holding the bag". Now it's time for Dog to call in some chits of his own, getting the help of trusty informants he's helped out over the years

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog told him not to go, but Charles went anyway, skipping to Oregon against the terms of his bail. Now Dog has a tip that Charles plans to slip back into Honolulu. With $30,000 on the line Dog knows he can leave little to chance.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: The following day is Dog's birthday, but that won't stop him from chasing a fugitive, who is facing firearms charges. Dog doesn't relish the thought of going after an alleged gunslinger on his birthday, but he's never one to avoid a challenge.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and Beth have to be at the state capitol bright and early to receive an award for their fight against ice in Hawaii. Afterwards, they're inspired to start the hunt for Shanna, an alleged ice user and identity thief with $80,000 in bonds.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Beth calls a client, Daphne, whose bond they have to revoke and makes a shocking discovery: Daphne's cosigner on her bond and ex-boyfriend, Bobby, has just committed suicide.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: An obviously ill Jeff continues to function in a confused state. Sammy Jo announces she's headed for New York to make it big as a model and no longer wants to keep her son, Danny. Blake offers the girl $100,000 to be a mother to the child.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Jeff's temper continues to grow more volatile. Adam attempts to implicate Jeff in the Cecil Colby/Logan Rhinewood scandal. After learning that Blake and Krystle intend to adopt Steven's son Danny, Alexis demands custody of her grandson.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Although Blake begs her to postpone taking action until Jeff's violent behavior can be explained. Fallon flies to Haiti to obtain a divorce; Mark shows up unexpectedly at her hotel. Alexis tells Adam she cannot allow Jeff to be poisoned.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Alexis is concerned the doctors will learn the truth behind Jeff's illness, but Adam tries to cover by ordering his office remodeled and the lethal paint compound removed. Mark and Fallon get closer in Haiti.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Krystle suspects Alexis knows the reason for Jeff's illness; Blake tries to prevent Alexis' proposed merger; Jeff is released from the hospital and Kirby reveals her feelings for him.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: As Blake is departing for Singapore to identify his son, Alexis intercepts him at the airport to assure him she will not be stopped from merging their respective companies.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Blake persaudes Steven to return to Denver for his son's sake; the rest of the Carringtons are emotional, learning that Steven's alive and returning home; once home, Steven reunites with Alexis.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Upon hearing that Kirby has married Jeff, Joseph tells his daughter she has ruined her life. Blake suggests to Alexis they call a truce to their battle over Steven; Alexis offers Steven a share in Colbyco.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: As the Board of Directors gathers to vote on the Denver-Carrington/Colbyco merger, Alexis pointedly tells the group that a nay vote will be met with immediate dismissal. The approval of the motion sends Blake into a fury.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Blake confronts Alexis with evidence of fraudulent figures involved in the recent merger; Alexis learns Blake's lucrative oil extraction process does not extend to Colbyco. Newlyweds Jeff and Kirby have their first fight.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: A scandalous newspaper headline implicates Congressman McVane with a young girl in Washington; he realizes Alexis orchestrated his downfall. Kirby finds she is pregnant.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: When Blake learns Steven's attorney Chris has moved in with his son, he vows to fight for custody of little Danny. Morgan Hess, Alexis' private investigator, asks his employer for a large sum of money to pay off a gambling debt.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Krystle and Alexis, trapped in a burning cabin far off in the woods, find the door has been locked--from the outside. Mark, who has come to see Krystle in this remote setting, dramatically rescues the two women, who are rushed to the hospital.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Mark is charged with attempted murder and arson; Alexis tells Blake and the police his motive was revenge. The other suspects-McVane, Hess and Adam, are questioned and released.
